mapper.select: SELECT o.*, u.username AS userName, g.name AS goodsName, o.num * g.price AS totalAmount FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', IFNULL(#{userName}, ''), '%') LEFT JOIN goods g ON o.goods_id = g.id AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', IFNULL(#{goodsName}, ''), '%') WHERE o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', IFNULL(#{orderNo}, ''), '%') AND (o.user_id = #{userId} OR #{userId} IS NULL)
